steps.summary: Created docs/toolkit/readiness_manifest.json and docs/toolkit/README.md. The manifest lists public-safe required artifacts and reproduction commands for quality_preflight, demo_poc, workflow_rebuild_report, and feedback_queue_report. Protected paths such as data/, embeddings/, *.db, *.pdf, and data/dogfood/ are explicitly excluded from public readiness artifacts.

Added scripts/toolkit_readiness.py and tests/test_toolkit_readiness.py. The checker loads readiness manifest, validates required artifacts, rejects protected required artifacts, optionally runs reproduction commands, and renders a markdown readiness report. Verification: python -m pytest tests/test_toolkit_readiness.py -q -> 5 passed, with existing .pytest_cache warning.

Generated docs/reports/2026-07-05-tk3-toolkit-readiness-report.md with scripts/toolkit_readiness.py. The report is Overall PASS: required public artifacts exist and quality_preflight, demo_poc, workflow_rebuild_report, and feedback_queue_report commands all pass.

Closed toolkit-packaging-readiness with docs/reports/2026-07-05-tk4-toolkit-readiness-close-report.md. Close gate passed: tests/test_toolkit_readiness.py + tests/test_feedback_queue.py -> 12 passed; toolkit_readiness ok True; quality_preflight ok/public_safe True; git diff --check only LF->CRLF warnings. Recommended next horizon is firm-facing-poc-brief.
